---
title: "Product Strategy 2025"
subtitle: "Accelerating Growth Through Platform Innovation"
author: "Strategy Team"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: ../themes/impeccable-corporate.scss
    slide-number: c/t
    hash: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center: false
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    transition: fade
    transition-speed: default
    code-line-numbers: false
    highlight-style: github-dark
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@100..900&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:ital,wght@0,100..700;1,100..700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:ital,wght@0,100..700;1,100..700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

## Executive Summary {.section-header}

::: {.notes}
Open with the strategic context. What decisions need to be made?
Keep the executive summary to 3 key points max.
:::

---

## Business Context

:::: {.two-col}
::: {.div}
### Market Position

The market is shifting toward **platform-first** strategies. Key dynamics:

- Industry consolidation accelerating — 3 major acquisitions in Q4
- Customer expectations moving from products to [**ecosystems**]{.hi}
- Margin pressure on standalone offerings increasing year over year

::: {.quotebox}
"The next decade belongs to platforms, not products."

[— Industry Analyst Report, 2025]{.attribution}
:::
:::

::: {.div}
### Our Opportunity

::: {.keybox}
**Strategic Window**

We have an [**18-month window**]{.hi} to establish platform leadership before competitor entry. Our existing customer base (2.3M users) provides the distribution advantage.
:::

Current market share: **23%** → Target: **35%** by Q4 2026
:::
::::

---

## Key Metrics — Current State

:::: {.three-col}
::: {.kpi-card}
[**$47.2M**]{.kpi-value}

[Annual Recurring Revenue]{.kpi-label}

[+18% YoY]{.kpi-delta .positive}
:::

::: {.kpi-card}
[**2.3M**]{.kpi-value}

[Active Users]{.kpi-label}

[+32% YoY]{.kpi-delta .positive}
:::

::: {.kpi-card}
[**4.2%**]{.kpi-value}

[Monthly Churn]{.kpi-label}

[-0.8pp YoY]{.kpi-delta .positive}
:::
::::

::: {.tipbox}
**Positive Signal**

All core metrics trending favorably. The challenge is converting growth momentum into platform defensibility before the market window closes.
:::

::: {.notes}
Lead with the numbers. These KPIs establish credibility before
you propose strategy changes.
:::

---

## Strategic Priorities {.section-header}

---

## Three Pillars of Growth

:::: {.three-col}
::: {.methodbox}
**Pillar 1: Platform Foundation**

Build the technical infrastructure for third-party integrations and marketplace capabilities.

- API Gateway launch
- Developer portal
- Partner SDK

**Timeline:** Q1–Q2 2025
:::

::: {.methodbox}
**Pillar 2: Ecosystem Expansion**

Grow the partner network and establish the integration marketplace.

- 50+ launch partners
- Revenue sharing model
- Certification program

**Timeline:** Q2–Q3 2025
:::

::: {.methodbox}
**Pillar 3: Enterprise Tier**

Capture the enterprise segment with advanced features and dedicated support.

- SSO & compliance
- Custom SLAs
- Dedicated CSM

**Timeline:** Q3–Q4 2025
:::
::::

---

## Financial Projections

:::: {.two-col}
::: {.div}
### Revenue Forecast

| Quarter | Revenue | Growth |
|---------|---------|--------|
| Q1 2025 | $12.8M | +15% |
| Q2 2025 | $14.2M | +11% |
| Q3 2025 | $16.5M | +16% |
| Q4 2025 | $19.1M | +16% |
| **FY 2025** | **$62.6M** | **+33%** |

[Assumes platform revenue begins contributing in Q3.]{.smaller}
:::

::: {.div}
### Investment Required

::: {.warningbox}
**Capital Requirements**

- **Engineering:** $4.2M (12 additional headcount)
- **Partnerships:** $1.8M (BD team + launch incentives)
- **Infrastructure:** $2.1M (scaling + security audit)
- **Total:** $8.1M additional investment
:::

::: {.keybox}
**ROI Projection**

Expected payback period: [**14 months**]{.hi}

NPV at 3-year horizon: **$28.4M**
:::
:::
::::

---

## Competitive Landscape

:::: {.comparison}
::: {.compare-left}
### Risk: Status Quo

- Margin erosion of 2-3% annually
- Competitor platform launches in 12-18 months
- Customer concentration risk increases
- No ecosystem moat
:::

::: {.compare-right}
### Opportunity: Platform Pivot

- Platform fee revenue (20-30% margins)
- Network effects compound over time
- Partner ecosystem creates switching costs
- First-mover advantage in segment
:::
::::

::: {.notes}
Frame this as a risk comparison, not just an opportunity pitch.
Decision-makers respond to loss aversion.
:::

---

## Implementation Roadmap

:::: {.sidebar-right}
::: {.div}
### Phase 1: Foundation (Q1–Q2)

- Core API development and documentation
- Partner onboarding pipeline design
- Security and compliance audit
- Internal dogfooding period

### Phase 2: Launch (Q3)

- Public beta with 50+ partners
- Developer conference announcement
- Marketplace soft launch
- Customer migration tooling

### Phase 3: Scale (Q4+)

- Full marketplace launch
- Enterprise tier GA
- International expansion planning
:::

::: {.div}
::: {.tipbox}
**Quick Wins**

Three initiatives that can begin immediately with existing resources:

1. API documentation sprint
2. Partner interest survey
3. Internal integration prototype
:::

::: {.warningbox}
**Dependencies**

- Legal review of revenue sharing model (2-week lead)
- Compliance certification for enterprise tier
- Infrastructure capacity planning approval
:::
:::
::::

---

## Team & Resources

| Role | Current | Needed | Gap |
|------|---------|--------|-----|
| Backend Engineers | 8 | 14 | +6 |
| Frontend Engineers | 5 | 7 | +2 |
| DevRel / Partnerships | 1 | 4 | +3 |
| Product Manager | 2 | 3 | +1 |

::: {.methodbox}
**Hiring Strategy**

Priority hires: 2 senior backend engineers (API expertise) and 1 Head of Partnerships. Remaining roles can phase in through Q2.

Estimated time-to-fill: 6-8 weeks for senior roles, 4-6 weeks for mid-level.
:::

---

## Risk Mitigation

:::: {.two-col}
::: {.warningbox}
**Key Risks**

1. **Technical:** API stability under partner load
2. **Market:** Competitor accelerates timeline
3. **Execution:** Hiring delays in tight market
4. **Financial:** Revenue ramp slower than projected
:::

::: {.tipbox}
**Mitigation Plan**

1. Phased rollout with load testing gates
2. Accelerate MVP scope, defer non-critical features
3. Engage recruiting firm + referral bonus program
4. Conservative base case maintains current trajectory
:::
::::

---

## Decision Required

::: {.keybox}
**Recommendation**

Approve $8.1M platform investment to execute the three-pillar strategy over FY 2025.

**Expected outcome:** 33% revenue growth, platform moat established, 14-month payback.
:::

### Next Steps

1. **Board approval** — Present at April board meeting
2. **Hiring kickoff** — Begin senior engineering search immediately
3. **Partner outreach** — Soft-launch interest survey within 2 weeks
4. **Technical planning** — Architecture review sprint in Week 1

[Questions & Discussion]{.larger}

::: {.notes}
End with a clear ask and specific next steps.
Make it easy for decision-makers to say yes.
:::
